title: Pedigree Biscrok Multi Mix - Dog Treats - Bone-Shaped Biscuits - 500 g
features: Dog training treats with Omega 3 to help keep them fit for life
Dog treats for training with Vitamin E to help support natural defences
Treats for dogs with minerals including Calcium to help keep bones strong
Beef dog treats and lamb dog treats with no artificial colours or flavours
Developed with nutritionists & veterinarians from WALTHAM Petcare Science Institute
